title: Bege Captures the Group
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on bege captures the group within the Capone Bege Takes Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: We came here under direct orders from Mama to capture Caesar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Furthermore, extenuating Circum- stances have arisen which could quite possibly break apart even your crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So I'll gladly turn a blind eye to this! I'll report that part of our mission as a failure!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: So please, just hand over Caesar!! I'll say we failed to capture the "Straw hat pirates!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm sure I'll be able to smooth things out with her somehow...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: What the hell, pekoms?! Are you fucking serious?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Don't put your own personal interests ahead of our mission!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Keep your mouth shut, newcomer! I'll take what- ever punishment comes myself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They've saved the lives of my family and friends... I can't ...I won't let any- thing happen to them...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: [11:34] <prjkt> I'm not sure if I'm

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You naive shit. >>

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He shot his own crewmate in the back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: to think someone like this was able to make a name for himself as a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Absolutely pathetic... letting his emotions and personal feelings get the better of him... such things will only turn you into a fool and a coward...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We ain't got no more use for someone like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll handle things from here on out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Everybody out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wahah! Watch

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: HAAAH?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gchink!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ehh!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Humans-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Surrender.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You're out of your depth here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You know me, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Someone who

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: You should... your captain's caused quite a few waves in this 'era' and I've been riding that current....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What the hell kind of devil fruit user are we dealing with?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've eaten the "Shiro Shiro no mi"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Did humans really just pop out of his stomach....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm a "Shiro Man**

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I thought I saw people in the palm of your hand earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So I wasn't seeing things after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I would've liked to have gone all out and blown him into oblivion with a cannon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But I didn't wanna cause a scene!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: With so many eyes on us, it would have caused trouble for me as well!!

summary: Bege Captures the Group: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
